notes: Stats and rules verified against Wahapedia datasheet.
Weapon list includes all options from the datasheet; the app may show only equipped weapons (policy question).
Points cost is the base Hive Tyrant cost before any weapon upgrades.
Keywords are the canonical 40k game keywords (all-caps on the datasheet).
FIXTURE REQUIREMENT: Needs 'Xenos - Tyranids.cat' loaded to test against live data.
To add the fixture: download from https://github.com/BSData/wh40k-10e and place in test/

knownDiscrepancies.note: Synaptic Imperative is not a standalone <rule> node in the BSData catalog; it appears as a named ability group / profile category header. The pipeline surfaces only materialised rule nodes, so this name is never emitted. Removed from expectedRules; absence is correct pipeline behaviour for this fixture version.
Warlord is a keyword / category tag in the BSData catalog, not a <rule> or <profile type='ability'> node. It is not expected to surface in the rules pipeline output. Removed from expectedRules.

Wahapedia labels this ability 'Onslaught'; the BSData catalog stores the full 10th-ed form 'Onslaught (Aura, Psychic)'. The pipeline emits the catalog name verbatim. expectedRules uses the catalog name. Wahapedia also describes the rule differently ('charge' text); the catalog description references [ASSAULT] and [LETHAL HITS] — both describe the same mechanical effect. descriptionSubstring updated to match the catalog description.

Leader was previously absent from the Hive Tyrant dump. Fixed in M5 infoGroups traversal: _bindContainerChildren now recurses into infoGroup/infoGroups nodes, surfacing the Leader rule that was stored inside an infoGroup element. Confirmed present via regression pin test in unit_audit_test.dart.

BSData fixture reports M=8". Wahapedia shows M=10". Inspection test (Task 1) confirmed only one 'Hive Tyrant' UnitDoc exists in the fixture index — this is not a wrong-variant-selected issue. The fixture was captured at an older catalog version. Pipeline correctly reads the fixture data. Audit surfaces the discrepancy; fixture is left unmodified per raw-source audit policy.
Fixture reports W=10; Wahapedia shows W=14. Same root cause as M stat: catalog version drift. Single Hive Tyrant entry confirmed by inspection test — not a wrong-variant issue.
Fixture reports LD=7+; Wahapedia shows LD=6+. Same defect is present in the Winged Hive Tyrant fixture. Catalog version drift affecting the Tyranid LD characteristic across the faction.
Fixture pts=195; Wahapedia shows 210. Points costs change with Balance Dataslate updates. Fixture was not updated to a more recent dataslate version.

knownDiscrepancies.weaponName: Monstrous Bonesword and Lash Whip / S stat
knownDiscrepancies.note: Fixture weapon profile has S=9; Wahapedia shows S=12. Catalog version drift in the shared Library - Tyranids.cat weapon profile.

Heavy Venom Cannon weapon profile in the fixture (Library - Tyranids.cat) has older stats: A=D3, BS=2+, S=9, D=3. Wahapedia shows A=3, BS=4+, S=10, D=D6+1. Same discrepancy affects Winged Hive Tyrant. Catalog version drift in shared library weapon profile.

Tyrant Talons is listed on the Wahapedia Hive Tyrant datasheet but does not appear in the BSData fixture. The weapon option was either not yet added or is stored differently in the fixture version. Pipeline cannot surface weapons absent from the fixture.
Monstrous Bio-Cannon is listed on the Wahapedia Hive Tyrant datasheet but does not appear in the BSData fixture. Catalog version drift — weapon option absent from this fixture version.
Monstrous Rending Claws is listed on the Wahapedia Hive Tyrant datasheet but does not appear in the BSData fixture. Catalog version drift — weapon option absent from this fixture version.
Psychic Scream is listed on the Wahapedia Hive Tyrant datasheet but does not appear in the BSData fixture. Catalog version drift — weapon option absent from this fixture version.

These weapons appear in the Hive Tyrant BSData entry but are not on the Wahapedia datasheet. They are valid optional weapon loadouts in the BattleScribe catalog. Policy decision: show all possible options vs only default/datasheet-listed weapons.

BSData entries include Crusade: Weapon Modifications, Crusade: Battle Honours, Crusade: Experience, and Crusade Points cost fields (all value 0). These are Crusade campaign cost fields present on all entries in the catalog. Policy decision: should these be shown in the app UI or filtered to pts-only?
